channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mississauga’s Ridgeway Plaza to implement security measures to manage gatherings and traffic
item.description: The City of Mississauga has reached an agreement with the Ridgeway Plaza Condominium Corporations to improve safety and reduce nuisance gatherings at Ridgeway Plaza. The plaza, home to 115 restaurants...

item.title: Labor MP Julie Collins criticised over bulk billing flyer naming GP clinics
item.description: Labor MP Julie Collins has attracted criticism after distributing a flyer across her Franklin electorate in Tasmania to promote Labor’s Bulk Billing Practice Incentive Program (BBPIP). The leaflet hig...

item.title: Supreme Court Sets Guidelines for Functioning and Legal Status of Local Tribunals
item.description: Nairobi — The Supreme Court of Kenya has cleared the air on the role and legal definition of local tribunals following a long-standing dispute involving Parliament. The matter arose from a petition fi...

item.title: Creamline Cool Smashers return to PVL finals after three conferences, eyeing 11th title
item.description: The Creamline Cool Smashers are once again heading to the PVL finals after a three-conference drought, reclaiming their dominant form in Philippine volleyball. The team secured their final berth by de...

item.title: Madlanga Commission of Inquiry Continues Hearing Witness Testimonies
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry has resumed proceedings to investigate alleged criminality, political interference, and corruption within South Africa's criminal justice system. On Thursday, the co...

item.title: Retired Army veteran stops chain‑snatching attempt in Hyderabad, felicitated by police
item.description: एक रिटायर्ड आर्मी जवान ने हैदराबाद में एक चेन‑स्नैचिंग की कोशिश को बीच रास्ते में रोक दिया और आरोपी को पकड़वाने में मदद की। घटना शहर के सामान्य इलाके में हुई, जब दो बाइक‑सवार बदमाश एक महिला से सोने की...

item.title: Pre-trial hearing for accused killers of Shailen Singh postponed in Durban High Court
item.description: The family of Shailen Singh, a 32-year-old businessman from Mount Edgecombe, are awaiting justice following the tragic killing of their loved one. Singh, who owned the logistics company Shails Trans, ...

item.title: PCSO Announces No Jackpot Winners in Major Lotto Draws for April 16
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) reported that no one won the jackpot prizes in the major lotto draws conducted on Thursday, April 16, 2026. The winning numbers for Lotto 6/42, which c...

item.title: Olusegun Mimiko Resigns from PDP, Cites Absence from Party Activities
item.description: Naija, make we yarn you the latest. Former Ondo State Governor, Olusegun Mimiko, don officially resign from the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP). Him send letter dated April 10, 2026, go the chairman of...

item.title: Government to Finalise Public Investment Bill to Strengthen Public Entity Performance
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has announced that it will finalise the Public Investment Bill in the 2026/27 financial year as part of broader reforms to make public institutions more efficient and accoun...

item.title: Appeal Court Confirms Reinstatement of 455 Police Officers Previously Retired Forcefully
item.description: The Abuja Division of the Court of Appeal don confirm say 455 senior police officers wey dem retire forcefully must resume duty. This follow appeal wey the Police Service Commission carry try challeng...

item.title: Strategic Significance of the Strait of Hormuz in Global Energy and Geopolitics
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz, at only 33 kilometers wide at its narrowest point, serves as a critical chokepoint for global energy supply, with roughly 21 million barrels of oil and 20 percent of LNG traded d...

item.title: Major train disruption at Manchester Piccadilly due to overhead cable failure
item.description: Manchester Piccadilly station has issued a 'do not travel' advisory following a significant overhead cable failure, causing widespread disruption across all train services. The issue is expected to pe...

item.title: Islamabad updates commercial timings in line with national energy conservation drive
item.description: On Thursday, the Islamabad Capital Administration announced new business closure timings as part of the federal government’s wider energy-saving measures. The updated notification, issued by Deputy Co...

item.title: Labour MP launches sexual wellbeing campaign focused on British identity and public health awareness
item.description: A column by John Crace reports on Labour MP Samantha Niblett’s launch of a provocative campaign centred on sexual wellbeing, which she frames as part of “taking control of our Britishness”. Associated...

item.title: Orthocell Receives U.S. Approval to Distribute Remplir™ Nerve Repair Device in Military and VA Hospitals
item.description: Orthocell Limited, an Australian regenerative medicine company, has obtained approval for its Remplir™ nerve repair device to be used across the United States Department of Defence (DoD) and Veterans ...

item.title: Akhilesh Yadav questions BJP's commitment to women empowerment in Parliament
item.description: On Thursday, Samajwadi Party president Akhilesh Yadav raised concerns in the Lok Sabha over the Bharatiya Janata Party-led government's approach to women’s empowerment. He questioned the lack of women...

item.title: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies in train accident
item.description: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger has sadly passed away at 48 after a tragic accident where him car get hit by train near Salzburg. The incident happen around 08:20 local time for one level cro...

item.title: UK Government Plans for Possible Food Supply Disruptions Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The UK government is preparing contingency plans for potential food shortages, particularly affecting chicken and pork, if the ongoing conflict in Iran escalates. Officials are considering a scenario ...

item.title: UK-born man faces charges in connection with double murder and shooting in Atlanta
item.description: A man originally from the United Kingdom has been arrested in Atlanta, Georgia, in connection with two murders and a separate shooting incident. Authorities described the actions as extremely violent,...
